title: Roper Technologies to Present at Raymond James Technology Investors Conference
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Nov. 30, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ROP) announced that it is presenting at the Raymond James Technology Investors Conference on Wednesday, December 7, at 9:10 AM (Eastern Time), at the Lotte New York Palace in New York, NY. A link to the webcast presentation will be available in the “Investors” section of the Company's website at www.ropertech.com. The presentation can also be accessed directly by using the following URL https://wsw.com/webcast/rj126/rop/1485637.

title: Here's Why You Should Give Roper (ROP) Stock a Shot Now
text: Roper (ROP) is poised for growth on the back of strength across all its segments, acquired assets and portfolio restructuring initiatives. The company's efforts to add shareholder value hold promise.

title: Roper Technologies' Growth Prospects Look Encouraging
text: Healthy market conditions have helped the company generate higher organic sales growth in the third quarter of 2022. In the fourth quarter of 2022, the company completed the acquisition of Frontline Education, which has high recurring revenues and margins.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For December 2022
text: NOBL gained 10.31% in October, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 8.96%. Thus far this month, through November 22nd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.52%, bringing its year-to-date return to -3.03%.

title: Roper Technologies (ROP) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Roper Technologies (ROP) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Roper (ROP) Rewards Shareholders With 10% Dividend Hike
text: Roper's (ROP) dividend increase for 30 consecutive years is supported by its strong free cash flow generation capacity.

title: Roper Technologies Announces Transition Plan for Chief Financial Officer
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Nov. 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ROP) today announced that, effective February 1, 2023, Jason Conley, Roper's Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, will succeed Rob Crisci as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.

title: Merck, Nike Among 14 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In The Second Half Of November
text: There were a few double-digit boosts in the first half of November. Most notably, ADP came through with a 20% increase and Snap-On Tools with a 14% increase. Emerson extended its dividend growth streak to 66 years with a 1% boost and Lancaster Colony started its 7th decade of dividend growth with a 6% increase.

title: Roper Technologies Increases Dividend 10% - Its 30th Consecutive Annual Dividend Increase
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Nov. 10, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ROP) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.6825 per share, payable on January 23, 2023 to stockholders of record as of January 9, 2023. This represents an increase of 10% over the dividend paid in each quarter of 2022, or an expected $0.25 increase on an annual basis ($0.0625 on a quarterly basis). This is the thirtieth consecutive year in which Roper has increased its dividend.
